{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Silverlord's repurposed script
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]] uses [[Silverlord's repurposed script]] in her formation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
